1=Supervision - oversight help only
 2=Physical help limited to transfer only
 3=Physical help in part of bathing activity
 4=Total dependence
 8=Activity itself did not occur or family and/or non-facility staff provided care 100% of the time for that activity over the entire 7 day period discontinued 09/30/2023
239 G0120B_BATHG_SPRT_CD G0120B_BATHG_SPRT_CD G0120B ADL Assistance: Bathing Support Provided Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies how much support the resident requires
